en.name: Company Data
en.description: Enter the company's legal name, registered address, and tax number in Xentral Grundeinstellungen. Required before any document, shipment, or country-based workflow can run.

documentation.overview:
Covers Einstellungen > Grundeinstellungen > Firmendaten in Xentral (accessible via system search: "Firmendaten").

Stores the company's legal identity: name, registered address, and tax ID. These values appear on all outgoing documents (invoices, delivery notes, offers) and drive country-specific logic for warehouses, shipping, and tax.

No blocking dependencies — this card can be the very first step.
Must be completed before: payment_methods, warehouse_setup, chart_of_accounts, and any document template.

Note: Grundeinstellungen are system-wide. Project- or sales-channel-level settings (e.g. email templates, mail addresses) can override them per Xentral documentation.
capabilities: Set the company's legal name (shown on documents and in the Xentral UI for the team)
Store the registered address (street, postal code, city, ISO country code)
Enter the VAT ID or tax number (Umsatzsteuer-ID / Steuernummer)
Add SEPA Gläubiger ID for SEPA direct debit collection
Add EORI number for businesses importing or exporting goods to/from the EU
inputs: Registered address (street, PLZ, city, ISO country code)
SEPA Gläubiger ID (only if Lastschrifteinzug is used)
EORI number (only if EU import/export applies)
outputs: Company name visible in Xentral UI and on all outgoing documents
ISO country code set — unlocks Lagerort, shipping, and Länderkonfigurationen
documentation.notes:
The ISO country code (Land) is especially critical — it gates Lagerort creation, shipping setup, and country-based tax rules. Enter the two-letter ISO code (DE, AT, CH, etc.).

USTID and Steuernummer are separate fields in the Xentral UI but only one typically applies. German companies usually use the Umsatzsteuer-ID (format: DE + 9 digits).

SEPA Gläubiger ID is a legal prerequisite for running Lastschrifteinzug — only needed if the business collects payments via SEPA direct debit.

EORI number is required by customs authorities for any EU cross-border import or export.

sections.title: Company address (Firmenanschrift)
sections.hint: All fields are required by Xentral. Enter the legal registered address of the company's headquarters — not a trade name or operational address.

human.text: Legal company name and registered address
human.why: These details appear on every outgoing document and identify the business in the system. Must reflect the legal entity exactly.

fields.label: Company name (Name)
fields.human_why: Legal name of the company as registered. Shown in the Xentral UI for the team and printed on all outgoing documents. Must match the legal entity name exactly — not a trade name.

fields.label: Street and house number (Straße)
fields.human_why: Street of the registered address. Printed on invoices, delivery notes, and offers.

fields.label: Postal code (PLZ)
fields.human_why: Postal code of the registered address.

fields.label: Country ISO code (Land)
fields.human_why: Two-letter ISO country code of the company's registered country. Required for Lagerort creation, shipping configuration, and country-specific tax rules. DE = Germany, AT = Austria, CH = Switzerland.

fields.label: VAT ID or tax number (USTID / Steuernummer)
fields.human_why: Umsatzsteuer-ID (EU VAT format: DE + 9 digits) or Steuernummer depending on legal form. German GmbHs use the Umsatzsteuer-ID. Required for correct tax handling on all documents.

sections.title: Additional identifiers
sections.hint: Only needed for specific use cases. Leave blank if not applicable.

fields.label: SEPA Creditor ID (SEPA Gläubiger ID)
fields.human_why: Legal prerequisite for running SEPA Lastschrifteinzug (direct debit collection). Issued by the company's bank or Bundesbank. Only needed if this business collects payments via SEPA direct debit — leave blank otherwise.

fields.label: EORI number (EORI Nummer)
fields.human_why: Required for businesses that import goods into the EU or export from the EU. Issued by the national customs authority. Leave blank if no cross-border trade outside the EU applies.

de.name: Grundeinstellungen
de.description:
Konfiguriere die zentralen Systemeinstellungen in den Xentral Grundeinstellungen — Nummernkreise,
Standard-Belegverhalten, Lagerverwaltung und Mahnwesen. Erforderlich,
bevor ein Order-to-Cash-Prozess gestartet werden kann.

documentation.overview:
Deckt Einstellungen > Grundeinstellungen in Xentral ab. Diese Einstellungen definieren
systemweite Standards, die jeden Auftrag, jede Rechnung und jedes Dokument betreffen.

Muss abgeschlossen sein vor: payment_methods, chart_of_accounts, warehouse_setup.
Hängt ab von: company_basics (Firmenname und Adresse müssen zuerst vorhanden sein).
capabilities: Dokumenten-Nummernkreise (Nummernkreise) für Aufträge, Rechnungen, Lieferscheine konfigurieren
Standard-Belegverhalten festlegen (E-Mail automatisch senden, automatisch drucken, in Archiv kopieren)
documentation.notes:
STUB — fields not yet authored. Scope to be defined with Bene before WOZ-12.

Known field areas for v1:
- Nummernkreise (Aufträge, Rechnungen, Lieferscheine, Gutschriften)
- Lagerverwaltung aktiv (toggle)
- Mahnwesen aktiv (toggle)
- Standard-Sprache / Locale

sections.title: [Stub — noch nicht verfasst]
sections.hint: Felder für diese Karte sind noch nicht definiert. Siehe documentation.notes für den geplanten Umfang.

fields.label: Stub-Karte
fields.text: basic_settings ist noch nicht vollständig verfasst. Felder werden Nummernkreise, Lagerverwaltung, Mahnwesen und Spracheinstellungen abdecken. Umfang ist mit Bene vor dem PR zu bestätigen.
